rationale: Turn 1 correctly wakes up to the repeated local-repair pattern and refuses to add another endpoint patch. Turn 2 keeps the brake active and does not deliver the requested entry-page copy, placement, field, option, checklist, command sequence, or implementation step. It also preserves a bounded exception frame with one-time language via “一次例外决策” and rejects baseline lift by saying the entry page should not become a fourth failure-after-patch point. However, the structural repair deadline is only vague (“上线后必须收敛”) rather than visibly time-bound, so it is an incomplete emergency contract rather than a full pass.
